de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature

Class MonomialsSmallerThanFeature

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.BinaryFeature
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.BinaryTacletAppFeature
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.SmallerThanFeature
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.AbstractMonomialSmallerThanFeature
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.MonomialsSmallerThanFeature
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feature

    public class MonomialsSmallerThanFeature
extends AbstractMonomialSmallerThanFeature
    Feature that returns zero iff each monomial of one polynomial is smaller than all monomials of a second polynomial

      • filter

        protected boolean filter(TacletApp app,
             PosInOccurrence pos,
             Goal goal)
        Description copied from class: BinaryTacletAppFeature
        Compute whether the result of the feature is zero (true) or infinity (false)
        Specified by:
        filter in class BinaryTacletAppFeature
        Parameters:
        app - the TacletApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        true iff the the result of the feature is supposed to be zero.

               ServiceCaches caches)
        this overwrites the method of SmallerThanFeature

      • compareLexNewSyms

        private int compareLexNewSyms(ImmutableList<Term> atoms1,
                    ImmutableList<Term> atoms2,
                    ServiceCaches caches)

      • degree

        private int degree(Term t)
        Returns:
        the degree of a monomial (number of terms that are connected multiplicatively) -1. To ensure that also cases like f(a*b)=a*b are handled properly, we simply count the total number of multiplication operators in the term.
